tags.name: `mc-switch-group`
tags.description:
Purpose: Display switch groups with optional legends, hints, and error messages
Category: Forms, Actions
When to use: Forms, Surveys, User preferences
When not to use: Decorative purposes, Non-interactive elements
Works with components: mc-switch, mc-card, mc-modal, mc-drawer
Alternative component names: User Switch Group, Switch List, Selection Box Group, Switch Buttons, Toggle Group, On/Off Group

Events:

  * `change` {`"CustomEvent<string " | " undefined>"`} - Emitted when any of the mc-switch element in the group is checked/unchecked.

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - One or more <mc-switch> elements to display in the group.

  * ``legend`` {} - The legend HTML to use for the mc-switch-group.

  * ``hint`` {} - The hint HTML to use for the mc-switch-group.

  * ``errormessage`` {} - The errormessage HTML to use for the mc-switch-group.

attributes.name: onchange
attributes.description: `change` {`"CustomEvent<string " | " undefined>"`} - Emitted when any of the mc-switch element in the group is checked/unchecked.
